note.description: 0 is empty; 1..127 are note number plus 1; 128 is note off; 129 and above are note commands.

velocity.description: 0 selects the default velocity; non-zero values are stored directly in the pattern event.

module.description: 0 selects no module; non-zero values are one-based module slot references.

controller.description: 0 selects no controller or effect; packed 0xCCEE value where CC is controller number plus 1 and EE is the standard effect code.

value.description: Controller value or standard effect parameter.

observedBehavior.description: SunVox Lib 2.1.4d loads BPM=0 and saves it back as the default 125 BPM.

runtimeConstraints.description: SunVox Lib expects project BPM to be positive; keep raw values round-trip safe but warn before runtime use.

observedBehavior.description: SunVox Lib 2.1.4d loads speed=0 and saves it back as the default 6 ticks per line.

runtimeConstraints.description: SunVox Lib expects project speed to be positive; keep raw values round-trip safe but warn before runtime use.

observedBehavior.description: SunVox Lib 2.1.4d loads and saves a 32-byte module name without truncation; longer semantic names cannot be encoded into the fixed SNAM chunk.

runtimeConstraints.description: SunVox stores module names in a fixed-size name buffer; reject editable semantic names that cannot be encoded into the fixed SNAM chunk.
Negative module numbers are empty link slots in stored arrays and should not appear in semantic input link objects.
Negative module numbers are empty link slots in stored arrays and should not appear in semantic output link objects.
